  Track B — Keep building (deferred items from the plan):
  - Admin editing UI for render-meta scalars (orientation/height/floor-count) — explicitly deferred to "its own
  follow-up plan"; net-new since no per-building scalar editor exists.
  - OSM footprint import automation (currently a manual runbook/skill step).
  - Exact SE/FI layout via real floor plans + validating the Swedish lägenhetsnummer positional assumption.
  - Map-grounded overview (context buildings) — needs the standalone-Three.js-vs-MapLibre decision first.
  - Quick data audit of apartments.floor quality on target SE sites.

  Let me ask which direction you want to take, since the rest of the work forks on it.

● User declined to answer questions
  ⎿  · The whole 3D feature is built but unmerged (14 local commits, no PRs). Which track should we drive next?
     (Ship: open the PR train / Admin editing UI / OSM import automation / Floor-plan / SE layout accuracy)
